channel.title: Abouts on pretentiousUsername
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on pretentiousUsername

item.title: About me
item.description: I can certify, with one-hundred percent clarity, that is indeed me. Howdy! I’m an undergraduate physics student currently at Temple University. Outside of my current classwork, my main interests are in condensed matter physics (specifically in the areas more related to statistical statistical mechanics, such as interacting many-body theory), analog electronics, DSP, programming, typography, and music. So far, I have a groundbreaking zero publications in my field—and I’m proud to say I have a record-smashing zero citations as well; I am in fact in the top 100% of scholars with an ORCID.
